title: rosa canina f. scabrata
intro: Rosa canina f. scabrata, also known as the dwarf dog rose or prickly rose, is a variety of the Rosa canina species that is characterized by its thorny stems and small, yellowish-white flowers. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina f. scabrata include its rich content of vitamins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost immune function, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Rosa canina f. scabrata can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
